Headline: Merger - Soho Parish and All Souls Primary (State), London
Info: A proposed merger between Soho Parish and All Souls primary schools in Westminster has been abandoned after governors failed to reach an agreement, despite both state schools facing falling pupil rolls and financial pressures.

Headline: Financial - Multiple Independent Christian Schools, UK-wide
Info: The UK Supreme Court has granted permission for a group of independent Christian schools, parents, and pupils to appeal against the government's decision to impose VAT on private school fees, focusing on the policy's proportionality.
